---
title: Porto Vecchio, pieds dans le sable
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557425/portovecchio_20180815_epwwgx.png
description: Les pieds dans le sable de L à Porto Vecchio, Corse
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2018/08/15
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557425/portovecchio_20180815_epwwgx.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
